mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_download_conf t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.name},'%')
AND t.status = #{kbDownloadConfEntity.status}
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.type = #{kbDownloadConfEntity.type}
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_download_conf t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.name},'%')
AND t.status = #{kbDownloadConfEntity.status}
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbDownloadConfEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.type = #{kbDownloadConfEntity.type}
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_download_conf t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
